summary: Good-quality capture of an enjoyable Dead show, though reviewers give no specific song or performance details.
review: The three fans who rated this recording describe it as a good show with solid overall sound quality. No particular songs, transitions, or individual player highlights are mentioned, and one reviewer gave a zero‑star rating without elaboration, resulting in mixed overall sentiment.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews (4–5 stars) praise the show and its quality, while a third gives a zero rating; limited detail leads to a moderate overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers simply note the recording is of good quality but provide no specifics about clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing; reviewers only state the show was good.
